checklist.description: The procedure includes generating/updating the OpenAPI spec (e.g., pnpm run generate:openapi or equivalent)
checklist.name: OpenAPI spec generation mentioned

checklist.description: The procedure includes regenerating the TypeScript API client from the OpenAPI spec
checklist.name: TS api-client regeneration mentioned

checklist.description: The procedure includes regenerating the Go API client (e.g., pnpm run go:generate, go generate, or equivalent). This is the step agents most commonly forget.
checklist.name: Go api-client regeneration mentioned

checklist.description: The procedure includes a verification step after regeneration — running typecheck, checking for diffs, or building all consumers
checklist.name: Verification step included

checklist.description: The commands are in dependency order: OpenAPI first, then TS client, then Go client (not reversed or unordered)
checklist.name: Correct ordering

context: Tests whether the agent knows the full codegen chain: schema source → OpenAPI spec → TS api-client → Go api-client. Agents frequently forget the Go client regeneration, which causes silent failures (Go CLI breaks with decode errors at runtime, not at build time).
